mentions.surface: legi Bruti epistulam
Catonem primum sententiam putat de animadversione dixisse
quam omnes ante dixerant praeter Caesarem
cum ipsius Caesaris tam severa fuerit
cur ego in sententiam Catonis
quia Cato laudibus extulerat in caelum
I have read Brutus's letter
He thinks Cato spoke first to the motion on the punishment
whereas all had spoken before him except Caesar
since Caesar's own opinion, delivered while he was of praetorian rank
Why then did I put the question on Cato's motion
because Cato had carried all this to the skies in praise
si vero etiam a Faberio aliquid recedit
venales certe sunt Drusi
If indeed something also comes loose from Faberius
The gardens of Drusus are certainly for sale
de Terentia non possum commodius scribere
About Terentia I cannot write more aptly
Oviae C. Lolli curanda sunt HS C
negat Eros posse sine me
The 100,000 sesterces owed to Ovia, the wife of Gaius Lollius
Eros says it cannot be done without me
quod me in forum vocas
quid enim mihi foro sine iudiciis, sine curia
quid enim mihi foro sine iudiciis, sine curia
ut Romae sim
As for your summoning me to the Forum
what is the Forum to me without the courts, without the senate-house
without the courts, without the senate-house
that I be at Rome
